tracking.query_invalid_input: Invalid tracking number. Only letters, numbers and hyphens allowed.

rates.subtitle: Manage tariffs, shipping zones, and calculate shipping costs.

rates.delete_card_msg: This will permanently delete this rate card and all its rules.
rates.delete_zone_msg: This will permanently delete this shipping zone.
rates.calc_shipment_modal_desc: Creating shipments from the Calculator is in development. Use Shipments → Create to create shipments with the wizard.
rates.calc_ready_desc: Enter shipment details to see available rates
rates.calc_no_zone: No matching shipping zone or rate rules found for this route.
rates.calc_hero_subtitle: Get instant pricing for your shipments. No account needed to calculate.
rates.calc_no_rates_desc: No shipping services are configured for this route. Configure zones and rate cards in the Rates section.

profile.username_help: This is your public display name. It can be your real name or a pseudonym.
profile.api_tokens_desc: Manage API access keys and permissions.
profile.email_help: You can manage verified email addresses in your email settings.
profile.bio_placeholder: Tell us a little bit about yourself
profile.bio_help: You can @mention other users and organizations to link to them.

integrations.desc: Connect external services to your platform.
integrations.marketplaces_desc: Sync orders and labels with e-commerce platforms.
integrations.client_id_secret_required: Client ID and Secret are required.
integrations.carrier_no_response: Carrier API did not respond in time.
integrations.config_required_msg: Save App ID and Secret before authorizing.
integrations.config_missing_msg: Client ID is required to run the test.
integrations.google_not_configured: Google Integration not configured. Please save credentials first.
integrations.carrier_dhl_ok: DHL API reachable (auth required for full test).
integrations.carrier_test_timeout: Connection timeout. Carrier API did not respond in time.

errors.api_key_required: API Key is required when carrier is enabled.
errors.account_number_required: Account Number is required when carrier is enabled.
errors.enable_requires_credentials: Enter API Key and Account Number before enabling this carrier.

integrations.carrier_usps_notice: Test connection only. Rate quotes and labels coming in a future release.

maps.title: Maps Configuration
maps.desc: Configure map providers for the Dispatch module. Mapbox is the default provider. Google Maps requires a paid API key. OpenStreetMap is free and used as fallback.
maps.mapbox_desc: Default map provider. Requires a Mapbox access token.
maps.mapbox_token_hint: Get your token from mapbox.com. Starts with 'pk.'
maps.google_desc: Alternative paid provider. Requires a Google Maps API key.
maps.google_key_hint: Get your API key from Google Cloud Console. Starts with 'AIza'.
maps.default_center_desc: Initial position shown when no drivers have GPS locations.
maps.fallback_info: If no provider is configured or keys are missing, the system will automatically use OpenStreetMap (free, no key required).

errors.mapbox_required: Mapbox token is required when Mapbox is active or set as default provider.
errors.mapbox_invalid: Mapbox token must start with pk.
errors.google_required: Google Maps API key is required when Google Maps is active.
errors.google_invalid: Google Maps API key must start with AIza.

shipping_config.title: Shipping Configuration
shipping_config.desc: Operational settings for shipments: tax, units, volumetric, surcharges, and numbering.
shipping_config.surcharges_desc: Applied when no rate rule is used.
shipping_config.invoice_numbering_desc: Prefix, padding and next number for invoices.
shipping_config.tracking_numbering_desc: Prefix, padding and next number for tracking numbers.
shipping_config.how_it_works_tax: Tax rate is applied on top of every shipment calculation (rate cards and internal fallback).
shipping_config.how_it_works_units: Weight & dimension units are used to normalize package dimensions before quoting rates.
shipping_config.how_it_works_divisor: Volumetric divisor determines chargeable weight: L × W × H ÷ divisor (standard: 5000 for cm/kg, 139 for in/lb).
shipping_config.how_it_works_surcharges: Surcharges (base, fuel %, insurance %) are applied when no custom rate rule overrides them.
shipping_config.how_it_works_sequences: Numbering sequences control the format of invoice and tracking numbers generated for each shipment.
shipping_config.tax_desc_full: Applied to every shipment quote. The name appears on shipment invoices.
shipping_config.tax_name_help: E.g. VAT, IVA, GST — shown on invoices.
shipping_config.units_desc_full: Weight and dimension units used for package normalization before rate calculations.
shipping_config.volumetric_desc_full: Chargeable weight = max(actual weight, L × W × H ÷ divisor). International standard is 5000 for cm/kg.
shipping_config.volumetric_divisor_help: 5000 for cm/kg · 139 for in/lb. Must be ≥ 1.
shipping_config.fallback_desc: Used only when no rate card or rate rule matches the shipment. Configure your rate cards in Rates > Cards for zone-based pricing.
shipping_config.base_price_help: Flat base amount charged on every internal fallback shipment.
shipping_config.price_per_kg_help: Per-kg rate multiplied by chargeable weight (max of actual vs volumetric).
shipping_config.surcharges_desc_full: Applied on top of the base rate. These apply to both rate card rules and the internal fallback (unless overridden at rule level).
shipping_config.base_surcharge_help: Flat amount added to every shipment.
shipping_config.insurance_help: Applied as % of declared value (or subtotal if no declared value).
shipping_config.invoice_prefix_help: Letters shown before the number (e.g. INV).
shipping_config.invoice_padding_help: Minimum digits; shorter numbers are zero-padded.
shipping_config.invoice_next_help: The number that will be used on the next invoice.
shipping_config.invoice_reset_help: Automatically resets the counter to 1 on the chosen interval.
shipping_config.tracking_prefix_help: Letters shown before the number (e.g. TRK, DEP).
shipping_config.tracking_padding_help: Minimum digits; shorter numbers are zero-padded.
shipping_config.tracking_next_help: The number that will be used on the next tracking number generated.
shipping_config.tracking_reset_help: Automatically resets the counter to 1 on the chosen interval.

lockers.title: Locker Code Settings
lockers.desc: Configure the automatic code format used when new lockers are created.
lockers.code_section_desc: Define the prefix, format, and length for automatically generated locker codes.
lockers.preview_hint: Example of what a newly generated locker code will look like.
lockers.prefix_hint: Letters and numbers only (max 10 chars). E.g. LCK, BOX, MP.
lockers.format_hint: Random generates an unpredictable alphanumeric code. Sequential increments a counter.
lockers.length_hint: Number of characters after the prefix (4–12).
lockers.info_random: Random codes use unambiguous characters (no 0/O/1/I) to avoid customer confusion.
lockers.info_sequential: Sequential codes increment automatically per organization and never repeat.

api.title: API Management
api.desc: Manage API access, tokens, webhooks, and view request logs for your organization.
api.personal_access_tokens_desc: Create and manage API keys for your custom integrations. Use Bearer tokens for authenticated API calls.
api.api_clients_desc: OAuth-style client credentials for third-party applications (Zapier, n8n, Make, custom). Client ID + Secret with scopes and rate limits.
api.webhooks_desc: Subscribe to events (e.g. shipment.created, tracking.updated). Configure callback URLs and secrets for verified delivery.
api.request_logs_desc: View recent API requests, status codes, response times, and errors. Filter by endpoint, status group, or date range.
api.logs_desc_table: Recent API requests. Sensitive payloads are not shown.
api.name: Name
api.scopes_help: Select which API scopes this client can use.
api.save_credentials_desc: The client secret will not be shown again. Copy both values and store them securely.
api.rotate_secret_msg: Generate a new secret for "{{name}}". The previous secret will stop working immediately.
api.quick_start_step1: Create a Personal Access Token or an API Client for machine-to-machine integrations.
api.quick_start_step2: Send requests to the base URL with header: Authorization: Bearer <token>
api.quick_start_step3: Subscribe to Webhooks to receive real-time push notifications when shipments are created or status changes.
api.quick_start_step4: Monitor all incoming requests and errors in Request Logs.
api.how_to_guide_title: How to use this API Client
api.ip_whitelist_hint: One per line, leave empty to allow any IP
api.webhook_retry_desc: Deprixa retries failed deliveries up to 3 times with a 60-second backoff. Each attempt is logged in the delivery history.
api.webhook_subscribe_desc: Subscribe to Deprixa events and receive real-time HTTP notifications.
api.provider_hint: Groups related events. Auto-filled from the event name.
api.signing_secret_desc: Deprixa sends X-Deprixa-Signature: sha256=<hmac> with every request.
api.webhook_disabled_warning: Disabled — no events will be sent
api.webhook_integration_desc: When a subscribed event occurs, Deprixa sends a POST request to your Callback URL with a JSON body.

tracking.numbering_managed_in_shipping: Tracking and invoice numbering (prefix, padding, next number) are configured in
tracking.title: Tracking & Labels
tracking.desc: Configure the shipping label layout, barcode type, and print theme.
tracking.this_page_desc: This page controls label layout, barcode, and visual theme.
tracking.preview_subtitle: Sample data — reflects your current settings
tracking.label_config_desc: These settings are applied every time a shipping label is generated for a shipment.
tracking.paper_size_help: 4×6" is the standard for thermal printers. A4 for laser/inkjet.
tracking.output_format_help: PDF for standard printers. ZPL for Zebra/thermal printers via raw protocol.
tracking.barcode_type_help: Code 128 is the most widely compatible. QR encodes the full tracking URL.
tracking.info_1: When you open a shipment and click Print Label, these settings control the output.
tracking.info_2: The QR code on the label links to the public tracking page so recipients can track their package.
tracking.info_3: The barcode encodes the tracking number using the selected format (Code 128 / Code 39).
tracking.info_4: MercadoLibre shipments use the official ML label from their API instead of this template.

billing.numbering_managed_in_shipping: Manage invoice and tracking sequences in
billing.invoice_design_desc: Choose the visual style for your documents.

billing.signature_save_hint: Click "Save Configuration" after selecting an image to save the signature.
billing.configure_paypal_desc: Enter your PayPal REST API credentials.
billing.check_inputs: Please check your inputs and try again.
billing.unsaved_gateway: Payment gateway changes are not saved yet.
billing.currency_invoicing_desc: Default currency, payment terms, and invoice footer text.
billing.currency_help: Used as the default for new shipments and invoices.
billing.tax_help: Tax name and rate are configured in Shipping Configuration and applied to all invoices.
billing.invoice_terms_help: Printed in the "Terms" section of every invoice.
billing.footer_notes_help: Appears at the bottom of every invoice.
billing.stripe_test_active: Test mode active — no real charges

billing.new_signature_ready: New signature ready — will be saved when you click Save below.
billing.stripe_info: When a customer selects "Pay online" during shipment creation, they are redirected to a Stripe Checkout page. On success, the shipment is automatically marked as Paid.
billing.test_mode_help: Use test keys when enabled — no real charges.
billing.paypal_info: On "Pay online", customers are redirected to PayPal. The order is captured immediately on return, and the shipment is marked as Paid. Amount divergence is flagged as Partial for manual review.
billing.sandbox_mode_help: Use sandbox environment — no real charges.

updates.title: Updates
updates.desc: Keep your installation current. Your data is never affected by updates.
updates.activate_desc: Enter your Envato purchase code and your name or company. This is done only once.
updates.purchase_code_hint: Your purchase code is found in your Envato account → Downloads.
updates.check_desc: The system checks automatically twice a day. Click below to check now.
updates.deactivate_confirm: Deactivate the license on this server?
updates.on_latest: You are on the latest version (v{{version}}).
updates.update_ready_desc: Review the changes and apply with one click. Your data and settings are safe.
updates.warning_db: Database and uploaded files are never touched
updates.warning_backup: File backup created before any replacement
updates.apply_confirm:
Apply update to v{{version}}?

• Your database and uploaded files will NOT be affected
• A backup of all replaced files is created first
• If something fails, rollback runs automatically
updates.expired_desc: Your purchase code is still valid forever on Envato, but the automatic in-app updater requires an active support & updates subscription.
updates.manual_alt: You can also download v{{version}} manually from your
updates.manual_upload: page and re-upload it — your purchase code will remain valid.
updates.success_desc: All files replaced and migrations applied. Your data was not touched.
updates.auto_check: Automatic checks run at 08:00 and 20:00 server time. A badge appears in the top navigation when an update is available.
updates.user_update_desc: A new version of the platform is ready. Please notify your administrator to apply the update.
updates.user_on_latest: You are running the latest version ({{version}}). No updates available.

genetic_algorithm.settings_description: Configure the AI-powered optimization engine for routes, carriers, and workload distribution
genetic_algorithm.route_optimizer_desc: Uses a Genetic Algorithm to find the optimal delivery route for each driver
genetic_algorithm.carrier_selector_desc: Ranks and selects the best carrier for each shipment based on cost, time and reliability
genetic_algorithm.insights_engine_desc: Analyses historical data to surface actionable recommendations on the dashboard
genetic_algorithm.load_balancer_desc: Distributes unassigned shipments evenly across available drivers and branches
genetic_algorithm.weights_note: Cost + Time + Reliability weights should ideally sum to 1.0
genetic_algorithm.no_run_history: No runs yet. GA algorithms execute automatically when dispatch optimizes routes, assigns carriers, or balances workload.
genetic_algorithm.ai_provider_desc: Configure an OpenAI or Anthropic API key to enable natural-language shipment analysis and operational insights. Without a key the system uses built-in rule-based analysis.
genetic_algorithm.ai_key_set: Key saved — enter new key to replace
genetic_algorithm.ai_key_stored: Key is securely stored (encrypted). Leave blank to keep it.
genetic_algorithm.ai_what_it_does: What the AI does in Deprixa
genetic_algorithm.ai_feature_shipment: Shipment risk analysis: delays, exceptions, pending payments
genetic_algorithm.ai_feature_ops: Operational dashboard: natural-language summary of your fleet status
genetic_algorithm.ai_feature_fallback: Without an API key: built-in rule-based logic runs automatically

ai_ops.no_alerts: No active alerts — operations running smoothly
ai_ops.configure_prompt: Configure an AI provider in Settings to enable natural-language analysis of your operations.

commissions.title: Commissions
commissions.subtitle: Track and manage agent commissions
commissions.search_user: Search user by name or email...
commissions.min_amount_hint: Leave empty to apply at any amount
commissions.max_amount_hint: Leave empty for no upper limit
commissions.rule_has_commissions: Cannot delete a rule that has commissions associated with it.
commissions.only_pending_can_be_approved: Only pending commissions can be approved.
commissions.shipment_not_delivered: Commission cannot be approved: the linked shipment has not been delivered yet.
commissions.only_approved_can_be_paid: Only approved commissions can be marked as paid.
commissions.reversal_cannot_be_paid: Reversal records cannot be marked as paid.
commissions.how_it_works_body: Commission rules run automatically based on a trigger. 'On Creation' fires when the shipment is created. 'On Delivery' fires when a POD is recorded. 'On COD Remittance' fires when COD cash is remitted. Each matching rule creates a Commission record (Pending → Approved → Paid).
commissions.preview_hint: Enter a shipment amount to preview
commissions.preview_out_of_range: Amount is outside the configured range
commissions.trigger_on_hint: Defines when this rule fires and creates a commission
